creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't know if this is a Phabricator issue or our issue (or my mistake), but Phabricator does not appear to show deleted files based on Git commits for Ports.

In this review: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D29730

I remember deleting files from the branch, but Phabricator did not pick up the deleted files.
